Elon Musk Tweet Count Bets Surge with High Volume | NO | MED confidence**  
The "Elon Musk # tweets April 14 - April 21, 2026?" market, bucking at 24% for 260-279 tweets, draws buzz with $5M volume; traders highlight it as a high-liquidity play on Musk's posting habits, part of $16.2M+ tweet prediction activity.[4][5] No specific whale bets or mispricing calls noted in real-time data.
